case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. vs. LITTLEFIELD, DANIEL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP. SERVED DEC-30-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLEFIELD, DANIEL

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LITTLEFIELD, DANIEL
